# mlr3data

A small collection of interesting and educational machine learning data
sets which are used as examples in the [mlr3
book](https://mlr3book.mlr-org.com), the [mlr3
gallery](https://mlr3gallery.mlr-org.com), or in other examples of
[mlr3](https://mlr3.mlr-org.com) packages. All data sets are properly
preprocessed and ready to be analyzed by most machine learning
algorithms. Currently contains the following data sets:

1.  Housing prices in Kings County
    \[[link](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/reference/kc_housing.html)\]
2.  Titanic passenger survival data
    \[[link](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/reference/titanic.html)\]
3.  Optical recognition of handwritten digits data
    \[[link](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/reference/optdigits.html)\]
4.  Major League Baseball statistics 1962-2012
    \[[link](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/reference/moneyball.html)\]
5.  Indian Liver Patient Data
    \[[link](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/reference/ilpd.html)\]
6.  Bike Sharing Demand
    \[[link](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/reference/bike_sharing.html)\]

# Package index

## All functions

- [`ames_housing`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/ames_housing.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_ames_housing`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/ames_housing.md)
  : House Sales in Ames, Iowa
- [`bike_sharing`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/bike_sharing.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_bike_sharing`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/bike_sharing.md)
  : Bike Sharing Demand
- [`energy_usage`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/energy_usage.md)
  : Power Consumption of Kitchen Appliances in Ames, Iowa
- [`ilpd`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/ilpd.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_ilpd`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/ilpd.md)
  : Indian Liver Patient Dataset
- [`kc_housing`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/kc_housing.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_kc_housing`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/kc_housing.md)
  : House Sales in King County
- [`mlr3data`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/mlr3data-package.md)
  [`mlr3data-package`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/mlr3data-package.md)
  : mlr3data: Collection of Machine Learning Data Sets for 'mlr3'
- [`moneyball`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/moneyball.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_moneyball`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/moneyball.md)
  : Major League Baseball Statistics 1962-2012
- [`optdigits`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/optdigits.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_optdigits`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/optdigits.md)
  : Optical Recognition of Handwritten Digits
- [`penguins_simple`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/penguins_simple.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_penguins_simple`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/penguins_simple.md)
  : Simplified Palmer Penguins Data Set
- [`titanic`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/titanic.md)
  [`mlr_tasks_titanic`](https://mlr3data.mlr-org.com/dev/reference/titanic.md)
  : Titanic
